items.name: Lemon Shark Beanie
items.description:
Lemon Shark Beanie – When life gives you lemons… turn them into sharks! 🍋🦈 This beanie blends bright yellow citrus style with fierce shark features, complete with a leafy fin, toothy grin, and a splash of pink flair. Sweet, sour, and a little bit scary—perfect for players who like their fashion with a bite!
